hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.tsx?"' ; then FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path":\s*"\K[^"]+'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then npx @biomejs/biome format --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; exit 0

FILE_PATH=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path":\s*"\K[^"]+'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qiE '\.(db|sqlite|key|pem|p12|pfx)$'; then echo 'BLOCK: Cannot modify database or credential files directly' >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qiE '(^|\/)\.env'; then echo 'BLOCK: Cannot modify .env files — edit manually' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
